# Creator FAQ

## Samples
To request a sample, post your full shipping address in the #samples channel. Samples ship
within 5–7 business days. You can request one sample per active campaign.

## Commission
Commission is 20% of attributed sales, paid monthly on the 15th via the payment method on file.

## Getting started
New creators should introduce themselves in #community-chat and check #campaigns for the
current challenge.
